reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the SuperAgent home page with the sidebar showing available agents
Clicked on the "QA-20260605-185100-qgur" agent in the agent list — Agent chat interface opened and displayed the message input area
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the message input textbox — Message was entered correctly and the Send button became enabled
Clicked the Send message button — Message was sent and the agent began processing the request, showing "Working..." status
Waited up to 3 minutes for the agent response — Agent completed processing after approximately 9 seconds (well within the 3-minute timeout)

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." and "The page at https://example.com has the title \"Example Domain\"." The agent successfully demonstrated browser use capability by executing the following tools: ToolSearch, Open Browser (https://example.com), Browser MCP: Browser Get State, and Close Browser
